lastProjectCompletion.description: Privacy-first password breach monitoring tool using k-anonymity protocol. Never sends plaintext passwords to any server - only a 5-character hash prefix is transmitted. Features: k-anonymity API integration with HaveIBeenPwned, detailed breach information retrieval, risk level assessment (Safe→Critical), password strength validation with recommendations, batch processing for multiple passwords, CLI and library modes. Built with Rust (reqwest/rustls-tls, sha1, tokio). Comprehensive test suite with 35 passing tests. Excellent documentation including README, CONTRIBUTING.md, CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md.
